questions.question: 1 (a) • The student places the metre rule on the pivot. • He places the load P, labelled 1.5 N, on the metre rule at the 90.0 cm mark. • Keeping P at the 90.0 cm mark, he adjusts the position of the metre rule on the pivot so that the metre rule is as near as possible to being balanced. • In Table 1.1, he records the distance a from the 50.0 cm mark to the pivot. (i)
questions.text: 1 (a) • The student places the metre rule on the pivot. • He places the load P, labelled 1.5 N, on the metre rule at the 90.0 cm mark. • Keeping P at the 90.0 cm mark, he adjusts the position of the metre rule on the pivot so that the metre rule is as near as possible to being balanced. • In Table 1.1, he records the distance a from the 50.0 cm mark to the pivot. (i)

MP7 Compare chosen variable with time. Or plot graph of chosen variable against time
